content:
IVX IA CHAT ROOM END-TO-END DEPLOYMENT BLOCK

Objective:
Complete IVX IA Chat Room deployment 100% end-to-end with proof.

1. Verify GitHub
- Confirm repo
- Confirm branch
- Confirm latest commit SHA
- Confirm chat files pushed

2. Verify Render
- Confirm production service
- Confirm latest deployment ID
- Confirm deployment status
- Confirm latest commit deployed

3. Verify Backend
Test:
- GET /health
- GET /api/health
- POST /api/ivx/owner-ai/chat
- POST /api/chat/message

Return:
- URL
- HTTP status
- response body
- error body if failed

4. Verify Supabase
Confirm chat tables:
- conversations
- messages
- owner_ai_messages
- owner_ai_conversations

Confirm:
- message saves
- assistant reply saves
- conversation loads after refresh
- no disappearing messages

5. Verify Frontend Chat Room
Confirm:
- message sends
- assistant replies
- loading state works
- errors display correctly
- no false “couldn't read response”
- no TypeError: Network request failed
- scroll to latest works
- chat history loads

6. Verify Monitor / Stream / Live Work
Monitor must show:
- GitHub commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- health status
- chat API status
- Supabase status
- active task
- completed items
- blockers

Stream must show:
- live logs
- API calls
- errors
- deployment events

Live Work must show:
- task queue
- deploy action
- verify action
- report action

7. Final Proof Output

Return only this:

REPO:
BRANCH:
COMMIT_SHA:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
DEPLOY_STATUS:
HEALTH_STATUS:
CHAT_API_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
CHAT_SAVE_STATUS:
CHAT_LOAD_STATUS:
FRONTEND_CHAT_STATUS:
MONITOR_STATUS:
STREAM_STATUS:
LIVE_WORK_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
LOCAL ONLY
UNVERIFIED

Do not say COMPLETE unless GitHub + Render + health + chat API + Supabase + frontend chat are all verified.
